svg.title: LegacyScribe architecture diagram
svg.desc: Five-layer pipeline: user input, HuggingFace frontend Space, gradio_client, backend inference Space with llama.cpp and fine-tuned Qwen3.5-9B, five-agent swarm, and output.

g.text: Nepali · English · mixed — typed freely, no structure required
CPU Basic · Gradio 6 · custom HTML/CSS/JS UI
One-page lock · scrollable chat · book page with page-flip · swipe navigation
LoRA rank 16 · fine-tuned on 850 Nepali/South Asian examples · llama.cpp · n_gpu_layers=-1
agent defaults: arcdetector 10 tok / extractor 200 tok / questioner 200 tok / publisher 400 tok
turns · all_notes · chapters list · chapter_counter · notes_consumed_idx · current_chapter_idx
cleared on browser close · never persisted to disk
Unsloth + LoRA + TRL SFTTrainer · 850 examples · ~2.5 hrs · GGUF export Q4_K_M
